description_long: This bungalow features a modern, geometric design with a flat, multi-level roof and a predominantly white and black color palette. The structure is set back from the street, with a landscaped front yard that includes symmetrical rows of trees and shrubs, as well as paved walkways and a central courtyard area. The main building has large, rectangular windows and a prominent entryway, while the rear section appears more private and enclosed. The landscaping is meticulously organized, with planters and greenery providing a formal, urban aesthetic. The overall layout suggests a focus on both privacy and outdoor living, with clear separation between public and private spaces. The materials and design evoke a contemporary, minimalist architectural style.
description: A modern, flat-roofed bungalow with a white and black exterior, landscaped front yard, and large rectangular windows. The design is geometric and minimalist, with organized greenery and paved walkways.
description_view_0: Front view showing the landscaped yard, symmetrical trees, central courtyard, and the main entrance of the bungalow.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the elongated structure, flat roof, and the depth of the property with visible landscaping.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the back of the bungalow, private areas, and minimal landscaping compared to the front.
description_view_3: Opposite side view focusing on the building's width, window arrangement, and the spread of trees in the yard.
